ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock_exchanges table */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stocks table */,
  "day" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (analyst, portfolio manager, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the portfolios table */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stocks table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stocks table */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the alert (>, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stocks table */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g. SMA, EMA, RSI) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the machine learning model (e.g. linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
